alertName: LIA RECORDS WITH PACK UOM TYPE POPULATED

email.subject: Splunk Alert: $orgId$ + $dataSource$ + $alertName$
email.body: The alert condition for '$orgId$ + $dataSource$ + $alertName$' was triggered.

sql: SELECT org_id, location_id, item_id, pack_uom_type_id, pack_uom_quantity FROM DCI_LOCATION_ITEM_ASSIGNMENT WHERE 1=1 AND org_id= $orgId AND pack_uom_type_id is NOT NULL;
